# STARTER_UX_RESEARCH_GAP_MAP

Use this starter for **UX Research Gap Map**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/runtime/route_cards/rt_ux_research_gap_map.md`
- `dist/runtime/contracts_lite/ux_research_gap_map.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/ux-research-expert.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/content-and-case-study-expert.md`
- optional: `dist/runtime/skills/brand-strategy-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when the answer must separate known evidence from assumptions and map the next studies.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1879 words / ~2499 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_BRAND.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for UX Research Gap Map. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
